ci_support_linux_64_nodejs22.yaml:
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
nodejs:
- '22'

about.description:
BMAD-METHOD (Breakthrough Method for Agile AI-driven Development) is an
AI-driven agile development framework providing 12+ specialized AI agent
personas (architect, developer, product manager, QA, etc.) and structured
workflows across the full software development lifecycle. It supports
scale-adaptive intelligence for projects from bug fixes to enterprise systems.
about.summary: AI-powered agile development framework with specialized AI agent personas for the full software development lifecycle

about.description:
BMAD-METHOD (Breakthrough Method for Agile AI-driven Development) is an
AI-driven agile development framework providing 12+ specialized AI agent

name: bmad-method
raw_meta_yaml:
{% set name = "bmad-method" %}
{% set version = "6.2.2" %}

package:
  name: {{ name }}
  version: {{ version }}

source:
  url: https://registry.npmjs.org/{{ name }}/-/{{ name }}-{{ version }}.tgz
  sha256: 4caa8838a7ee628fa12b82e7c6d6ea64e6d0e0ef66d601d23a8877393869fbde

build:
  number: 0
  noarch: generic
  # Prevent nodejs run_exports from pinning to a specific major version;
  # pure-JS packages work with any nodejs >=20.
  ignore_run_exports_from:
    - nodejs

requirements:
  host:
    - nodejs 20.*
  run:
    - __unix   # [unix]
    - __win    # [win]
    - nodejs >=20

test:
  commands:
    - bmad --help              # [not win]
    - bmad-method --help       # [not win]
    - bmad.bat --help          # [win]
    - bmad-method.bat --help   # [win]

about:
  home: https://github.com/bmad-code-org/BMAD-METHOD
  license: MIT
  license_file: LICENSE
  summary: AI-powered agile development framework with specialized AI agent personas for the full software development lifecycle
  description: |
    BMAD-METHOD (Breakthrough Method for Agile AI-driven Development) is an
    AI-driven agile development framework providing 12+ specialized AI agent
    personas (architect, developer, product manager, QA, etc.) and structured
    workflows across the full software development lifecycle. It supports
    scale-adaptive intelligence for projects from bug fixes to enterprise systems.
  doc_url: https://bmad.io
  dev_url: https://github.com/bmad-code-org/BMAD-METHOD

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - rxm7706

about.description:
BMAD-METHOD (Breakthrough Method for Agile AI-driven Development) is an

personas (architect, developer, product manager, QA, etc.) and structured
workflows across the full software development lifecycle. It supports

about.summary: AI-powered agile development framework with specialized AI agent personas for the full software development lifecycle
